description_long: This is a large, robust wooden storage box with a rectangular shape and a dark brown finish. The front panel features a diagonal wooden brace and a small metallic clasp at the top center, suggesting the lid can be secured. The box has a flat, broad lid that appears to be removable or hinged, and the wood grain texture is visible across all surfaces, giving it a rustic, utilitarian appearance. The sides and back are plain, with recessed panels framed by thicker wooden borders. There are no visible handles or labeling areas, emphasizing its simple, functional design. The box is likely hollow inside, suitable for storing tools, equipment, or other items in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or outdoor spaces.
description: A large, dark brown wooden storage box with a flat lid, diagonal front brace, and metallic clasp, featuring a rustic, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the diagonal wooden brace and metallic clasp on the lid.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain recessed wooden panel with no visible hardware.
description_view_2: Back view with a plain recessed panel and no clasp or brace.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a plain recessed wooden panel.
